name: ai-zippy
description: AI Zippy - WordPress FSE Theme + WooCommerce
author: Zippy <dev@zippy.sg>

scripts.dev: concurrently "NODE_ENV=development vite build" "wp-scripts start --webpack-src-dir=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy/src/blocks --output-path=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy/assets/blocks" "wp-scripts start --webpack-src-dir=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy-child/src/blocks --output-path=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy-child/assets/blocks" "node bs.config.js"
scripts.build: vite build && npm run build:blocks && npm run build:child-blocks
